title: Direttiva (Nru. 2) mill-Ministru tal-Finanzi, l-Ekonomija u Investiment għall-Ħruġ ta' Euro 100,000,000 Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta
title_en: Direttiva (Nru. 2) mill-Ministru tal-Finanzi, l-Ekonomija u Investiment għall-Ħruġ ta' Euro 100,000,000 Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/161.123/mlt, expression eli/sl/161.123/20110817/mlt).

provisions.title: L-AVVI| LEGALI 362 tal-2010
provisions.content:
It-titolu ta’ din id-Direttiva hu Direttiva (Nru. 2) millMinistru tal-Finanzi, l-Ekonomija u Investiment g]all-}ru[ ta’
Euro 100,000,000 Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
G]andu jin]are[ ammont ta’ Euro 100,000,000 Stock talGvern ta’ Malta kif [ej:

}ru[ ta’ Stock.

(a) 3.75% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2015 (VI) Fungibility
Issue, u
(b) 5.25% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2030 (I) Fungibility
Issue, jew
(`) f’ammonti mi\-\ew[ Stocks imsemmija hawn qabel
b’valur nominali flimkien ta’ Euro 100,000,000.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
Il-]ru[ ta’ Stocks ser isir kif stipulat fil-prospett.

Mod tal-]ru[ ta’
Stock.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
Kull persuna u, jew enti jistg]u japplikaw g]al dawn liStocks. It-tqassim tal-iStocks isir kif hemm spjegat fil-prospett.

Policy dwar lallokazzjoni ta’
Stock.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
(1) Ta]t id-dispo\izzjonijiet tal-Att dwar is-Swieq
Finanzjarji, meta dawn l-iStocks ji[u allokati, g]andha ssir
applikazzjoni sabiex kull Stock jitqieg]ed fuq il-lista uffi`jali u
biex ikun negozjat fil-Bor\a ta’ Malta.

Negozju fil-Bor\a
ta’ Malta.
Kap. 345.

(2) Fit-3 ta’ Di`embru, 2010 wara l-pagament tal-ewwel
img]ax, kull ammont allokat fit-3.75% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta
2015 (VI) FI ji[i integrat mal-]ru[ e\istenti ta’ dan l-iStock u wara,
dawn i\-\ew[ Stocks jitqiesu b]ala Stock wie]ed.
(3) Fil-23 ta’ Di`embru, 2010 wara l-pagament tal-ewwel
img]ax, kull ammont allokat fit-5.25% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta
2030 (I) FI ji[i integrat mal-]ru[ e\istenti ta’ dan l-iStock u wara,
dawn i\-\ew[ Stocks jitqiesu b]ala Stock wie]ed.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
Is-somma ta’ flus li g]andha tin[abar bl-iStocks
imsemmija flimkien tkun ta’ Euro 100,000,000. L-Accountant
General jirriserva d-dritt li j\id is-somma li g]andha tin[abar
b’ammont ta’ mhux i\jed minn Euro 50,000,000.

Somma ta’ flus li
g]andha tin[abar.

provisions.title: g]andha tin[abar
provisions.content: (1) L-img]ax bir-rata ta’ Euro 1.875 g]al kull Euro 100,

provisions.title: Fidwa ta’ Stock
provisions.content:
(1) It-3.75% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2015 (VI) ji[i mifdi
b’parità fit-3 ta’ Di`embru, 2015.
(2) Il-5.25% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2030 (I) ji[i mifdi
b’parità fit-23 ta’ {unju, 2030.
